title: argemone alba var. typica
intro: Argemone alba var. typica, also known as white prickly poppy, is a plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Argemone alba var. typica include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and swelling, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Argemone alba var. typica include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the plant's flowers, leaves, or roots in hot water or applying them topically to the affected area.
